ew_context: Gold breaking above consolidation range as geopolitical tensions escalate - likely resuming impulsive wave higher
pattern_desc: Clean breakout above key resistance level 4675.13 with 5 prior touches. Price action supported by bullish EMA alignment and positive momentum
invalidation: Break back below 4675 invalidates the breakout pattern
